metadata.weight_definition: Each edge weight equals the total number of relationship evidences between two people. Every shared initiative, shared article, overlapping research-group membership, and advisorship adds 1 to the edge weight.

relation_types.initiative: People who appear together in the same initiative team.
relation_types.article: People who are linked to the same article record.
relation_types.research_group: People whose memberships in the same research group overlap in time.
relation_types.advisorship: Supervisor and student connected by an advisorship.
